title: Didymoglossum pinnatinervium

It is part of the genus Didymoglossum, which is native to Central and South America. The genus Didymoglossum is further classified within the subfamily Platycerioideae. This classification system is based on the plant's morphological and anatomical characteristics, as well as its evolutionary relationships with other species. The classification of Didymoglossum pinnatinervium is still subject to ongoing research and potential revisions in the field of botany.
